_publications._publicationTitle: Pharmacogenomic Synthetic Lethal Screens Reveal Hidden Vulnerabilities and New Therapeutic Approaches for Treatment of NF1-Associated Tumors.

_contextSnippet: These NF1-proficient clones produce full-length neurofibromin, whereas the NF1-deficient clones lack detectible neurofibromin expression
details: Successfully detected presence or absence of neurofibromin expression, showing NF1-proficient clones produce full-length neurofibromin while NF1-deficient clones lack detectable neurofibromin expression
